relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The river of life flows clear from Divine and Lamb throne.
The tree of life fruits monthly, and its leaves heal the nations.
Every curse is gone; servants worship before the throne.
They see Divine face and bear the name.
Night is gone; Divine light shines, and they reign into ages.
The words are trustworthy and true.
The coming one blesses those keeping the prophecy.
John again falls before the messenger.
The messenger says: worship the Divine.
The prophecy is not sealed, for the season is near.
The moment reveals chosen direction.
The coming one brings reward according to work.
Alpha and Omega is beginning and completion.
Washed robes enter the city and tree of life.
False and harmful patterns remain outside.
Jesus is root and offspring of David, bright morning star.
Spirit and bride say Come; the thirsty receive life-water freely.
The scroll’s witness is guarded.
The prophecy is not to be diminished.
Amen. Come, Lord Jesus.
Grace of Lord Jesus be with all.

contemplative_note: Revelation 22 is the final invitation: river, tree, no curse, healing of nations, morning star, and the Spirit and bride saying Come.
